title: Moonstone Meteorites
description: Expand and enhance your world with aesthetic meteorite craters, using just Vanilla blocks. Comes with custom loot and seamless terrain integration.
body:
# Moonstone Meteorites
## Description:
**Moonstone Meteorites** is a datapack that enhances and expands your world with the addition of organic meteorite craters that blend right into the natural look of your Minecraft world. It offers both a visually stunning experience and encourages exploration.

![A mesa crater biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc3006cfa4af59d6350fc7aad2d36ca61c6326f0_0.webp)

## Features
- 28 unique meteorite crater structures each with their own handcrafted buildings and diverse decorations. Each location has a story to tell.
- 8 different biome palettes: grassy, arid (desert, beach), icy, humid (jungle, swamp), mesa, stony, podzol (old growth forest) and mycelium (mushroom islands). Craters generate only in the biomes they fit in, ensuring a seamless integration in your world.
- custom loot tables to reward your exploration
- The craters are designed to be naturally scarce, appearing roughly every 900 blocks on average, making each encounter feel special.

![An overview all meteorite crater variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef4680ccebf88abc3357902a56041f99d54c86e8_0.webp)

## Discover more & Support
If you enjoy this datapack, feel free to explore other projects by Lemuron and Moonlighting Labs here on Modrinth.

On [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/lemuron/), you can find builds and maps that are far too large to be included in a datapack or mod. If that sounds like your kind of content, feel free to check them out as well.

If you would like to support my work and help make future projects possible, you are welcome to visit my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/lemuron) page.

![An icy biome crater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c733ed534a82e3f9d85cbf62f81ac9ad47d5bb2_0.webp)
